tools.name: activate_tab
tools.title: Activate Tab
tools.description: Switch to a specific Safari tab. Use list_tabs to find window/tab indices.

tools.name: add_contact_email
tools.title: Add Contact Email
tools.description: Add an email address to an existing contact.

tools.name: add_contact_phone
tools.title: Add Contact Phone
tools.description: Add a phone number to an existing contact.

tools.name: add_to_album
tools.title: Add Photos to Album
tools.description: Add photos to an existing album by photo IDs and album name.

photoIds.description: Array of photo media item IDs (max 500)

tools.name: add_to_playlist
tools.title: Add to Playlist
tools.description: Add a track to an existing playlist.

tools.name: add_to_reading_list
tools.title: Add to Reading List
tools.description: Add a URL to Safari's Reading List with an optional title.

url.description: URL to add to Reading List

title.description: Title for the Reading List item

tools.name: ai_agent
tools.title: On-Device AI Agent
tools.description: Run a prompt through Apple's on-device Foundation Models with access to AirMCP tools (Calendar, Reminders, Contacts). The on-device LLM autonomously decides which tools to call. Requires macOS 26+ with Apple Silicon.

prompt.description: What you want the on-device AI to do with your Apple data

systemInstruction.description: Optional system instruction for the AI agent

tools.name: ai_chat
tools.title: AI Chat
tools.description: Send a message to an on-device AI session using Apple Foundation Models. Note: each call creates a fresh session — sessionName is for caller-side tracking only, not server-side persistence. Requires macOS 26+.

sessionName.description: Name for this chat session (use same name to continue a conversation)

message.description: The message to send to the AI

systemInstruction.description: Optional system instruction for this session

tools.name: ai_plan_metrics
tools.title: AI Plan Metrics
tools.description: Run a sample of planner goals against the on-device Foundation Model and report the aggregate score. Useful after macOS / Apple Intelligence updates to catch planner regressions. Requires macOS 26+ with Apple Silicon. Each case makes one model call, so keep `limit` small for interactive use.

limit.description: Number of cases to sample from GOLDEN_PLANS (default: 5, max: 50).

seed.description: Deterministic seed for case selection (default: time-based). Fixing this is useful when comparing runs before/after a change.

tools.name: ai_status
tools.title: AI Status
tools.description: Check availability and status of Apple's on-device Foundation Models. Returns whether the model is available, macOS version, and Apple Silicon status.

tools.name: audit_log
tools.title: Audit Log
tools.description: Query the on-device audit log of tool calls. Reads JSONL rows from ~/.airmcp/audit.jsonl (+ rotated siblings) and returns recent entries newest-first with optional filters by tool / status / time window. Args are already PII-scrubbed at write-time; sensitive-tool entries have `_redacted` args.

since.description: Lower-bound ISO 8601 timestamp. Entries older than this are dropped. Defaults to 7 days ago.

tool.description: Filter to a single tool name (exact match).

status.description: Filter by status. Omit to include both.

tools.name: audit_summary
tools.title: Audit Summary
tools.description: Aggregate the audit log over a time window — total call count, error rate, and the busiest tools. Useful for weekly reviews and for spotting runaway agents (a sudden top-of-leaderboard `create_*` tool is a red flag).

since.description: Lower-bound ISO 8601 timestamp. Defaults to 7 days ago.

tools.name: bulk_move_notes
tools.title: Bulk Move Notes
tools.description: Move multiple notes to a target folder at once. Same limitations as move_note apply to each note (new ID, date reset, attachments lost). Returns per-note success/failure results.

ids.description: Array of note IDs to move (max 100)

tools.name: calendar_week_view
tools.title: Calendar Week View
tools.description: Display an interactive calendar week view showing events for a 7-day period.

startDate.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to current week's Monday.

tools.name: capture_area
tools.title: Capture Screen Area
tools.description: Capture a screenshot of a specific rectangular region of the screen. Coordinates are in screen pixels with origin at top-left. Requires Screen Recording permission.

x.description: X coordinate of the top-left corner of the capture region

y.description: Y coordinate of the top-left corner of the capture region

width.description: Width of the capture region in pixels

height.description: Height of the capture region in pixels

tools.name: capture_screen
tools.title: Capture Screen
tools.description: Capture a full-screen screenshot as a PNG image. Optionally specify a display number for multi-monitor setups (1 = main display). Requires Screen Recording permission.

display.description: Display number for multi-monitor setups (1 = main display). Omit for default display.

tools.name: capture_screenshot
tools.title: Capture Screenshot
tools.description: Take a screenshot and save to the specified path. Supports full screen, window, or selection capture.

path.description: Absolute file path to save the screenshot (e.g. '/tmp/screenshot.png')

region.description: Capture region: fullscreen (default), window, or selection

tools.name: capture_window
tools.title: Capture Window
tools.description: Capture a screenshot of the frontmost window. Optionally specify an app name to activate that app first and capture its window. Requires Screen Recording permission.

appName.description: Application name to activate before capture (e.g. 'Safari', 'Xcode'). If omitted, captures the frontmost window.

tools.name: classify_image
tools.title: Classify Image
tools.description: Classify an image using Apple Vision framework. Returns labels with confidence scores (e.g. 'dog', 'outdoor', 'food'). Works on any image file. Requires Swift bridge.

imagePath.description: Absolute path to the image file

tools.name: close_tab
tools.title: Close Tab
tools.description: Close a specific Safari tab. Use list_tabs to find window/tab indices.

tools.name: cloud_sync_status
tools.title: iCloud Sync Status
tools.description: Check iCloud sync status — see what usage data and config is synced across your Apple devices.

tools.name: compare_notes
tools.title: Compare Notes
tools.description: Retrieve full plaintext content of 2-5 notes at once for comparison. Use this after scan_notes to safely compare potentially duplicate or similar notes before deciding what to keep, merge, or delete.

ids.description: Array of 2-5 note IDs to compare

tools.name: complete_reminder
tools.title: Complete Reminder
tools.description: Mark a reminder as completed or un-complete it.

completed.description: Set to true to complete, false to un-complete (default: true)

tools.name: connect_bluetooth
tools.title: Connect Bluetooth
tools.description: Connect to a BLE device by its UUID. The UUID can be obtained from scan_bluetooth results. Note: the connection persists only while the server process is running.

tools.name: create_album
tools.title: Create Album
tools.description: Create a new photo album.

tools.name: create_contact
tools.title: Create Contact
tools.description: Create a new contact with name and optional email, phone, organization.

tools.name: create_directory
tools.title: Create Directory
tools.description: Create a new directory (and intermediate directories if needed).

path.description: Absolute path of the folder to create

tools.name: create_event
tools.title: Create Event
tools.description: Create a new calendar event. Recurring events cannot be created via automation. Attendees cannot be added programmatically.

calendar.description: Target calendar name. Defaults to first writable calendar.

tools.name: create_folder
tools.title: Create Folder
tools.description: Create a new folder. Optionally specify which account to create it in.

account.description: Account name (e.g. 'iCloud'). Defaults to primary account.

tools.name: create_note
tools.title: Create Note
tools.description: Create a new note with HTML body. The first line of the body becomes the note title automatically. Optionally specify a target folder.

tools.name: create_playlist
tools.title: Create Playlist
tools.description: Create a new playlist in Music.

tools.name: create_recurring_event
tools.title: Create Recurring Event
tools.description: Create a recurring calendar event via EventKit. Supports daily, weekly, monthly, and yearly recurrence with configurable intervals. Requires macOS 26+ Swift bridge.

calendar.description: Target calendar name. Defaults to the default calendar.

interval.description: Repeat every N frequency units (e.g. 2 = every 2 weeks)

daysOfWeek.description: Days of week for weekly recurrence (1=Sun, 2=Mon, ..., 7=Sat)

tools.name: create_recurring_reminder
tools.title: Create Recurring Reminder
tools.description: Create a recurring reminder via EventKit. Supports daily, weekly, monthly, and yearly recurrence with configurable intervals. Requires macOS 26+ Swift bridge.

list.description: Target reminder list name. Defaults to the default list.

interval.description: Repeat every N frequency units (e.g. 2 = every 2 weeks)

daysOfWeek.description: Days of week for weekly recurrence (1=Sun, 2=Mon, ..., 7=Sat)

tools.name: create_reminder
tools.title: Create Reminder
tools.description: Create a new reminder. Optionally set notes, due date, priority (0=none, 1-4=high, 5=medium, 6-9=low), and target list. Recurrence rules cannot be set via automation.

list.description: Target list name. Defaults to the default list.

tools.name: create_reminder_list
tools.title: Create Reminder List
tools.description: Create a new reminder list.

tools.name: create_shortcut
tools.title: Create Shortcut
tools.description: Create a new Siri Shortcut by name. Uses UI automation to open the Shortcuts app and create a new empty shortcut. The shortcut must be further configured in the Shortcuts app.

tools.name: delete_contact
tools.title: Delete Contact
tools.description: Delete a contact by ID. This action is permanent.

tools.name: delete_event
tools.title: Delete Event
tools.description: Delete a calendar event by ID. This action is permanent.

tools.name: delete_note
tools.title: Delete Note
tools.description: Delete a note by ID. The note is moved to Recently Deleted and permanently removed after 30 days.

tools.name: delete_photos
tools.title: Delete Photos
tools.description: Delete photos by local identifier. Shows macOS confirmation dialog for user approval. Requires macOS 26+ Swift bridge.

identifiers.description: Array of photo local identifiers to delete

tools.name: delete_playlist
tools.title: Delete Playlist
tools.description: Delete an existing playlist from Music.

tools.name: delete_reminder
tools.title: Delete Reminder
tools.description: Delete a reminder by ID. This action is permanent.

tools.name: delete_reminder_list
tools.title: Delete Reminder List
tools.description: Delete a reminder list by name. This action is permanent and removes all reminders in the list.

name.description: Name of the list to delete

tools.name: delete_shortcut
tools.title: Delete Shortcut
tools.description: Delete a Siri Shortcut by name. Uses the macOS shortcuts CLI (macOS 13+). This action is permanent and cannot be undone.

tools.name: disconnect_bluetooth
tools.title: Disconnect Bluetooth
tools.description: Disconnect a BLE device by its UUID.

tools.name: discover_tools
tools.title: Discover Tools
tools.description: Search available tools by keyword. Returns matching tools with descriptions. Use this instead of scanning all 250+ tools — describe what you need and get relevant tools.

tools.name: drop_pin
tools.title: Drop Pin
tools.description: Drop a pin at specific coordinates in Apple Maps.

tools.name: duplicate_shortcut
tools.title: Duplicate Shortcut
tools.description: Duplicate an existing Siri Shortcut. Exports the shortcut to a temporary file and re-imports it with a new name.

name.description: Name of the shortcut to duplicate (exact match)

tools.name: edit_shortcut
tools.title: Edit Shortcut
tools.description: Open a Siri Shortcut in the Shortcuts app for manual editing. Uses UI automation (System Events) to activate the app, search for the shortcut, and open it. The user can then edit the shortcut in the Shortcuts app UI.

tools.name: event_status
tools.title: Event Monitor Status
tools.description: Check if real-time event monitoring is active.

tools.name: event_subscribe
tools.title: Subscribe to Events
tools.description: Start real-time monitoring of Apple data changes: calendar, reminders, clipboard, mail unread count, focus mode, now-playing track, and watched file paths. Native observers (calendar/reminders/clipboard/focus/files) are pushed from the Swift bridge; mail and now-playing are polled. Requires the Swift bridge in persistent mode for the native observers.

tools.name: export_shortcut
tools.title: Export Shortcut
tools.description: Export a Siri Shortcut to a .shortcut file. Uses the macOS shortcuts CLI to save the shortcut to the specified output path.

outputPath.description: File path to export the .shortcut file to (e.g. ~/Desktop/MyShortcut.shortcut)

tools.name: find_related
tools.title: Find Related Items
tools.description: Given a note, event, reminder, or email ID, find semantically related items across all indexed Apple apps. Discovers cross-app connections (e.g., a calendar event related to notes and reminders about the same topic).

id.description: Item ID (as stored in the vector index)

tools.name: flag_message
tools.title: Flag Message
tools.description: Flag or unflag an email message.

tools.name: generate_image
tools.title: Generate Image
tools.description: Generate an image from a text description using Apple Intelligence on-device image generation (Image Playground). Returns the file path to the generated PNG. Requires macOS 26+ with Apple Silicon.

prompt.description: Text description of the image to generate

outputPath.description: Optional output path for the image (defaults to /tmp, must end in .png/.jpg)

tools.name: generate_plan
tools.title: Generate Plan
tools.description: Use Apple's on-device Foundation Model to analyze a goal and generate a suggested plan of AirMCP tool calls. Returns a JSON array of planned actions for the CALLER to review and execute — this tool does NOT execute anything itself. Requires macOS 26+. Works completely offline with no API keys.

goal.description: What you want to accomplish (e.g. 'organize my day', 'prepare for meeting')

context.description: Additional context (max 10K chars, e.g. snapshot text, recent events)

availableTools.description: List of available tool names to plan with. Defaults to common tools.

tools.name: generate_structured
tools.title: Generate Structured Output
tools.description: Generate structured JSON output from Apple's on-device Foundation Model with optional schema constraints. Useful for extracting structured data from natural language. Requires macOS 26+.

prompt.description: The prompt describing what structured data to generate

systemInstruction.description: Optional system instruction to guide output format

type.description: JSON type: string, number, boolean, array, object

schema.description: Optional JSON schema describing expected output fields

tools.name: generate_text
tools.title: Generate Text
tools.description: Generate text using Apple's on-device Foundation Model with custom system instructions. Runs entirely on-device via Apple Silicon. Requires macOS 26+.

prompt.description: The user prompt / instruction for text generation

systemInstruction.description: Optional system instruction to guide the model's behavior

tools.name: geocode
tools.title: Geocode
tools.description: Convert a place name or address to geographic coordinates. Returns up to 5 matching locations with latitude, longitude, country, and timezone.

query.description: Place name or address (e.g. 'Seoul', 'Tokyo Tower', '1600 Pennsylvania Ave')

tools.name: get_battery_status
tools.title: Get Battery Status
tools.description: Get battery percentage, charging state, power source, and estimated time remaining.

tools.name: get_bluetooth_state
tools.title: Get Bluetooth State
tools.description: Check whether Bluetooth is powered on, off, or unauthorized.

tools.name: get_brightness
tools.title: Get Brightness
tools.description: Get the current display brightness level.

tools.name: get_clipboard
tools.title: Get Clipboard
tools.description: Read the current text content of the system clipboard.

tools.name: get_current_location
tools.title: Get Current Location
tools.description: Get the device's current geographic location (latitude, longitude, altitude). Requires Location Services permission. First use triggers a macOS permission dialog.

tools.name: get_current_tab
tools.title: Get Current Tab
tools.description: Get the title and URL of the active Safari tab.

tools.name: get_current_weather
tools.title: Get Current Weather
tools.description: Get current weather conditions for a location using coordinates.

tools.name: get_daily_forecast
tools.title: Get Daily Forecast
tools.description: Get daily weather forecast for a location.

tools.name: get_directions
tools.title: Get Directions
tools.description: Get directions between two locations in Apple Maps.

tools.name: get_file_info
tools.title: Get File Info
tools.description: Get detailed file information including size, dates, kind, and tags.

tools.name: get_frontmost_app
tools.title: Get Frontmost App
tools.description: Get the name, bundle identifier, and PID of the currently active (frontmost) application.

tools.name: get_hourly_forecast
tools.title: Get Hourly Forecast
tools.description: Get hourly weather forecast for a location.

tools.name: get_location_permission
tools.title: Get Location Permission
tools.description: Check the current Location Services authorization status. Returns the permission state (not_determined, authorized_always, denied, restricted).

tools.name: get_photo_info
tools.title: Get Photo Info
tools.description: Get detailed metadata for a specific photo by ID.

tools.name: get_rating
tools.title: Get Rating
tools.description: Get the rating, favorited, and disliked status for a track.

tools.name: get_screen_info
tools.title: Get Screen Info
tools.description: Get display information including resolution, pixel dimensions, and Retina status.

tools.name: get_shortcut_detail
tools.title: Get Shortcut Detail
tools.description: Get details about a Siri Shortcut including its actions.

tools.name: get_track_info
tools.title: Get Track Info
tools.description: Get detailed metadata for a specific track by name.

tools.name: get_unread_count
tools.title: Get Unread Count
tools.description: Get unread message count across all mailboxes.

tools.name: get_upcoming_events
tools.title: Get Upcoming Events
tools.description: Get the next N upcoming events from now (searches up to 30 days ahead). A convenience wrapper that doesn't require date range parameters.

tools.name: get_volume
tools.title: Get Volume
tools.description: Get the current system output volume level and mute state.

tools.name: get_wifi_status
tools.title: Get WiFi Status
tools.description: Get the current WiFi status including connected network name, signal strength, and channel.

tools.name: get_workflow
tools.title: Get Workflow
tools.description: Retrieve a registered MCP prompt by name and return its workflow instructions as text. Useful in autonomous/Cowork environments where prompts cannot be invoked directly.

tools.name: gws_calendar_create
tools.title: Create Google Calendar Event
tools.description: Create an event in Google Calendar.

tools.name: gws_calendar_list
tools.title: List Google Calendar Events
tools.description: List upcoming events from Google Calendar.

tools.name: gws_docs_read
tools.title: Read Google Doc
tools.description: Read the content of a Google Doc by document ID.

tools.name: gws_drive_list
tools.title: List Drive Files
tools.description: List files in Google Drive. Supports query filters.

tools.name: gws_drive_read
tools.title: Read Drive File Metadata
tools.description: Get metadata for a Google Drive file by ID.

tools.name: gws_drive_search
tools.title: Search Drive
tools.description: Full-text search across Google Drive files by content or name.

query.description: Search text (searches file names and content)

tools.name: gws_gmail_list
tools.title: List Gmail Messages
tools.description: List recent Gmail messages. Supports query filters (e.g. 'from:alice is:unread').

tools.name: gws_gmail_read
tools.title: Read Gmail Message
tools.description: Read a Gmail message by ID. Returns subject, from, to, date, and body.

tools.name: gws_gmail_send
tools.title: Send Gmail
tools.description: Send an email via Gmail. Encodes the message in RFC 2822 format.

tools.name: gws_people_search
tools.title: Search Google Contacts
tools.description: Search contacts in Google People/Contacts.

tools.name: gws_raw
tools.title: Raw GWS Command
tools.description: Execute any Google Workspace CLI command. For advanced use when specific tools don't cover your need.

service.description: Service name. Allowed: gmail, drive, sheets, calendar, docs, slides, tasks, chat, forms, keep, people

tools.name: gws_sheets_read
tools.title: Read Google Sheet
tools.description: Read cell values from a Google Sheets spreadsheet.

tools.name: gws_sheets_write
tools.title: Write to Google Sheet
tools.description: Write values to a Google Sheets range.

tools.name: gws_status
tools.title: Google Workspace Status
tools.description: Check if Google Workspace CLI (gws) is installed and authenticated.

tools.name: gws_tasks_create
tools.title: Create Google Task
tools.description: Create a task in Google Tasks.

tools.name: gws_tasks_list
tools.title: List Google Tasks
tools.description: List tasks from Google Tasks (default task list).

tools.name: import_photo
tools.title: Import Photo
tools.description: Import a photo from a file path into Photos library. Optionally add to an existing album. Requires macOS 26+ Swift bridge.

filePath.description: Absolute file path to the image file to import

albumName.description: Album to add the imported photo to (must already exist)

tools.name: import_shortcut
tools.title: Import Shortcut
tools.description: Import a .shortcut file into Siri Shortcuts. Uses the macOS shortcuts CLI to import the shortcut from the specified file path.

filePath.description: Path to the .shortcut file to import

tools.name: is_app_running
tools.title: Is App Running
tools.description: Check whether an application is currently running. Returns process details if found.

tools.name: keynote_add_slide
tools.title: Add Keynote Slide
tools.description: Add a new slide to a Keynote presentation.

tools.name: keynote_close_document
tools.title: Close Keynote Document
tools.description: Close an open Keynote presentation, optionally saving changes.

tools.name: keynote_create_document
tools.title: Create Keynote Presentation
tools.description: Create a new blank Keynote presentation.

tools.name: keynote_export_pdf
tools.title: Export Keynote to PDF
tools.description: Export a Keynote presentation to PDF. Will overwrite an existing file at the same path.

outputPath.description: Absolute output path for the PDF file

tools.name: keynote_get_slide
tools.title: Get Keynote Slide
tools.description: Get detailed content of a specific slide including all text items and presenter notes.

tools.name: keynote_list_documents
tools.title: List Keynote Documents
tools.description: List all open Keynote presentations.

tools.name: keynote_list_slides
tools.title: List Keynote Slides
tools.description: List all slides in a Keynote presentation with title, body preview, and presenter notes.

tools.name: keynote_set_presenter_notes
tools.title: Set Keynote Presenter Notes
tools.description: Set presenter notes on a specific slide.

tools.name: keynote_start_slideshow
tools.title: Start Keynote Slideshow
tools.description: Start playing a Keynote slideshow from a specific slide.

tools.name: launch_app
tools.title: Launch App
tools.description: Launch an application by name. Lightweight — just activates the app without reading its accessibility tree.

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.title: List Mail Accounts
tools.description: List all mail accounts.

tools.name: list_albums
tools.title: List Photo Albums
tools.description: List all photo albums with name and item count.

tools.name: list_all_windows
tools.title: List All Windows
tools.description: List windows across all running applications with title, size, position, app name, and PID.

tools.name: list_bluetooth_devices
tools.title: List Bluetooth Devices
tools.description: List paired Bluetooth devices with their connection status.

tools.name: list_bookmarks
tools.title: List Bookmarks
tools.description: List all Safari bookmarks across all folders, including subfolder paths.

tools.name: list_calendars
tools.title: List Calendars
tools.description: List all calendars with name, color, and writable status.

tools.name: list_chats
tools.title: List Chats
tools.description: List recent chats in Messages with participants and last update time.

tools.name: list_contacts
tools.title: List Contacts
tools.description: List contacts with name, primary email, and phone. Supports pagination.

tools.name: list_directory
tools.title: List Directory
tools.description: List files and folders in a directory with metadata (kind, size, modification date).

tools.name: list_events
tools.title: List Events
tools.description: List events within a date range. Requires startDate and endDate (ISO 8601). Optionally filter by calendar name. Supports limit/offset pagination.

tools.name: list_favorites
tools.title: List Favorite Photos
tools.description: List photos marked as favorites.

tools.name: list_folders
tools.title: List Folders
tools.description: List all folders across all accounts with note counts.

tools.name: list_group_members
tools.title: List Group Members
tools.description: List contacts in a specific group.

tools.name: list_groups
tools.title: List Contact Groups
tools.description: List all contact groups.

tools.name: list_mailboxes
tools.title: List Mailboxes
tools.description: List all mailboxes across accounts with unread counts.

tools.name: list_messages
tools.title: List Messages
tools.description: List recent messages in a mailbox (e.g. 'INBOX'). Returns subject, sender, date, read status.

account.description: Account name. Defaults to first account.

tools.name: list_notes
tools.title: List Notes
tools.description: List all notes with title, folder, and dates. Optionally filter by folder name. Supports pagination via limit/offset.

limit.description: Max number of notes to return (default: 200)

offset.description: Number of notes to skip for pagination (default: 0)

tools.name: list_participants
tools.title: List Chat Participants
tools.description: List all participants in a specific chat.

tools.name: list_photos
tools.title: List Photos
tools.description: List photos in an album with metadata. Use list_albums to find album names first.

tools.name: list_playlists
tools.title: List Playlists
tools.description: List all Music playlists with track counts and duration.

tools.name: list_podcast_episodes
tools.title: List Podcast Episodes
tools.description: List episodes of a podcast show with title, date, duration, and played status.

tools.name: list_podcast_shows
tools.title: List Podcast Shows
tools.description: List all subscribed podcast shows with episode counts.

tools.name: list_reading_list
tools.title: List Reading List
tools.description: List all items in Safari's Reading List.

tools.name: list_reminder_lists
tools.title: List Reminder Lists
tools.description: List all reminder lists with reminder counts.

tools.name: list_reminders
tools.title: List Reminders
tools.description: List reminders. Optionally filter by list name and/or completion status. Supports pagination via limit/offset.

completed.description: Filter by completed status (true/false). Omit to list all.

limit.description: Max number of reminders to return (default: 200)

offset.description: Number of reminders to skip for pagination (default: 0)

tools.name: list_running_apps
tools.title: List Running Apps
tools.description: List all running applications with name, bundle identifier, PID, and visibility.

tools.name: list_shortcuts
tools.title: List Shortcuts
tools.description: List all available Siri Shortcuts on this Mac.

tools.name: list_tabs
tools.title: List Safari Tabs
tools.description: List all open tabs across all Safari windows with title and URL.

tools.name: list_tracks
tools.title: List Tracks
tools.description: List tracks in a playlist with name, artist, album, and duration.

tools.name: list_triggers
tools.title: List Event Triggers
tools.description: Show all skills with event triggers (calendar_changed, reminders_changed, pasteboard_changed, mail_unread_changed, focus_mode_changed, now_playing_changed, file_modified, screen_locked, screen_unlocked) and their debounce settings.

tools.name: list_windows
tools.title: List Windows
tools.description: List all visible windows across all running applications. Returns JSON with each window's app name, bundle ID, title, position, and size. Requires Accessibility permissions.

tools.name: local_llm_generate
tools.title: Local LLM Generate
tools.description: Generate text using a local Ollama model. Runs entirely on your machine — no data sent to any cloud. Requires Ollama running at localhost:11434. Useful for summarization, extraction, and analysis.

prompt.description: The prompt to send to the local LLM

tools.name: local_llm_status
tools.title: Local LLM Status
tools.description: Check if a local Ollama LLM is available and list installed models.

tools.name: mark_message_read
tools.title: Mark Message Read/Unread
tools.description: Mark an email message as read or unread.

tools.name: memory_forget
tools.title: Forget Memory Entries
tools.description: Delete context-memory entries. Provide exactly one selector: `id` (single entry), `key` (all entries with that key), or `tag` (all entries carrying that tag). Optional `kind` further restricts the delete within the chosen selector.

key.description: Delete all entries with this key

tag.description: Delete all entries tagged with this label

kind.description: Only delete entries of this kind

tools.name: memory_put
tools.title: Remember a Fact, Entity, or Episode
tools.description: Insert or update a context-memory entry. Use `fact` for durable key→value notes, `entity` for named people/places/projects, and `episode` for time-anchored records. If you omit `id`, the key is used as the stable id (so a second call with the same key upserts). `ttl_ms` makes the entry self-expiring.

tools.name: memory_query
tools.title: Query Context Memory
tools.description: List non-expired memory entries. All filters are AND-combined. Returns entries sorted by `updatedAt` descending by default. Safe read-only — use before composing LLM prompts so recent user-supplied context is recalled.

contains.description: Case-insensitive substring in key or value

tags.description: Match entries carrying ALL given tags

tools.name: memory_stats
tools.title: Context Memory Stats
tools.description: Summarize the context-memory store: counts by kind, oldest/newest timestamps, and on-disk path. Also sweeps any expired entries as a side-effect.

tools.name: minimize_window
tools.title: Minimize Window
tools.description: Minimize or restore a window.

restore.description: Set true to restore (un-minimize) instead of minimizing

windowTitle.description: Specific window title. If omitted, targets the first window.

tools.name: move_file
tools.title: Move File
tools.description: Move or rename a file or folder to a new location.

source.description: Absolute path of the file or folder to move

tools.name: move_message
tools.title: Move Message
tools.description: Move a message to another mailbox.

targetAccount.description: Target account name. Searches all accounts if omitted.

tools.name: move_note
tools.title: Move Note
tools.description: Move a note to a different folder. NOTE: Apple Notes has no native move command, so this copies the note body to the target folder and deletes the original. The note will get a new ID and creation date. Attachments (images) will be lost.

tools.name: move_window
tools.title: Move Window
tools.description: Move a window to a specific position on screen.

windowTitle.description: Specific window title. If omitted, targets the first window.

tools.name: music_player
tools.title: Music Player
tools.description: Display an interactive music player showing the currently playing track.

tools.name: now_playing
tools.title: Now Playing
tools.description: Get the currently playing track and playback state.

tools.name: numbers_add_sheet
tools.title: Add Numbers Sheet
tools.description: Add a new sheet to a Numbers spreadsheet.

tools.name: numbers_close_document
tools.title: Close Numbers Document
tools.description: Close an open Numbers spreadsheet, optionally saving changes.

tools.name: numbers_create_document
tools.title: Create Numbers Document
tools.description: Create a new blank Numbers spreadsheet.

tools.name: numbers_export_pdf
tools.title: Export Numbers to PDF
tools.description: Export a Numbers spreadsheet to PDF. Will overwrite an existing file at the same path.

outputPath.description: Absolute output path for the PDF file

tools.name: numbers_get_cell
tools.title: Get Numbers Cell
tools.description: Read a single cell value by address (e.g. 'A1').

tools.name: numbers_list_documents
tools.title: List Numbers Documents
tools.description: List all open Numbers spreadsheets.

tools.name: numbers_list_sheets
tools.title: List Numbers Sheets
tools.description: List all sheets (tabs) in a Numbers spreadsheet.

tools.name: numbers_read_cells
tools.title: Read Numbers Cell Range
tools.description: Read a range of cells from a sheet. Uses 0-based row/column indices.

tools.name: numbers_set_cell
tools.title: Set Numbers Cell
tools.description: Write a value to a single cell.

tools.name: open_address
tools.title: Open Address
tools.description: Open a specific address in Apple Maps.

tools.name: open_url
tools.title: Open URL
tools.description: Open a URL in Safari's frontmost window.

tools.name: pages_close_document
tools.title: Close Pages Document
tools.description: Close an open Pages document, optionally saving changes.

tools.name: pages_create_document
tools.title: Create Pages Document
tools.description: Create a new blank Pages document.

tools.name: pages_export_pdf
tools.title: Export Pages to PDF
tools.description: Export an open Pages document to PDF. Will overwrite an existing file at the same path.

outputPath.description: Absolute output path for the PDF file

tools.name: pages_get_body_text
tools.title: Get Pages Body Text
tools.description: Get the body text content of an open Pages document.

document.description: Document name (as shown in title bar)

tools.name: pages_list_documents
tools.title: List Pages Documents
tools.description: List all open Pages documents with name, path, and modified status.

tools.name: pages_open_document
tools.title: Open Pages Document
tools.description: Open a Pages document from a file path.

path.description: Absolute file path to the .pages document

tools.name: pages_set_body_text
tools.title: Set Pages Body Text
tools.description: Replace the body text of an open Pages document.

tools.name: play_playlist
tools.title: Play Playlist
tools.description: Start playing a playlist by name, with optional shuffle control.

tools.name: play_podcast_episode
tools.title: Play Podcast Episode
tools.description: Play a specific podcast episode by name, optionally from a specific show.

showName.description: Show to search in (searches all shows if omitted)

tools.name: play_track
tools.title: Play Track
tools.description: Play a specific track by name, optionally from a specific playlist.

tools.name: playback_control
tools.title: Playback Control
tools.description: Control Music playback: play, pause, nextTrack, previousTrack.

tools.name: podcast_now_playing
tools.title: Podcast Now Playing
tools.description: Get the currently playing podcast episode and playback state.

tools.name: podcast_playback_control
tools.title: Podcast Playback Control
tools.description: Control Podcasts playback: play, pause, next, previous.

tools.name: prevent_sleep
tools.title: Prevent Sleep
tools.description: Prevent the Mac from sleeping for a specified duration using caffeinate. Returns the process PID for cancellation.

seconds.description: Duration in seconds (default: 3600 = 1 hour, max: 86400 = 24 hours)

tools.name: proactive_context
tools.title: Proactive Context
tools.description: Get contextually relevant tool and workflow suggestions based on time of day, day of week, and your usage patterns. Like Siri Suggestions but for MCP — tells you what you probably want to do right now.

tools.name: proofread_text
tools.title: Proofread Text
tools.description: Proofread and correct grammar/spelling using Apple Intelligence (on-device Foundation Models). Requires macOS 26+ with Apple Silicon.

tools.name: query_photos
tools.title: Query Photos
tools.description: Query the Photos library with filters: media type, date range, favorites. Returns photo metadata (identifier, filename, date, dimensions). Requires Swift bridge.

tools.name: quit_app
tools.title: Quit App
tools.description: Quit a running application by name. May cause unsaved work to be lost.

tools.name: read_chat
tools.title: Read Chat
tools.description: Read chat details including participants and last update time by chat ID.

tools.name: read_contact
tools.title: Read Contact
tools.description: Read full details of a contact by ID including all emails, phones, and addresses.

tools.name: read_event
tools.title: Read Event
tools.description: Read full details of a calendar event by ID. Includes attendees (read-only), location, description, and recurrence info.

tools.name: read_message
tools.title: Read Message
tools.description: Read full content of an email message by ID. Content length is configurable (default: 5000 chars, max: 100000).

tools.name: read_note
tools.title: Read Note
tools.description: Read the full content of a specific note by its ID. Returns HTML body and plaintext.

tools.name: read_page_content
tools.title: Read Page Content
tools.description: Read the HTML source of a Safari tab. Specify window and tab index from list_tabs.

tools.name: read_reminder
tools.title: Read Reminder
tools.description: Read the full details of a specific reminder by ID.

tools.name: recent_files
tools.title: Recent Files
tools.description: Find recently modified files in a folder using Spotlight.

tools.name: record_screen
tools.title: Record Screen
tools.description: Record the screen for a specified duration (1-60 seconds). Returns the recording as a .mov file path. Requires Screen Recording permission.

display.description: Display number for multi-monitor setups (1 = main display). Omit for default display.

tools.name: remove_from_playlist
tools.title: Remove from Playlist
tools.description: Remove a track from a playlist.

tools.name: reply_mail
tools.title: Reply to Email
tools.description: Reply to an email message. Requires allowSendMail config.

id.description: Original message ID to reply to

tools.name: resize_window
tools.title: Resize Window
tools.description: Resize a window to specific dimensions.

windowTitle.description: Specific window title. If omitted, targets the first window.

tools.name: reverse_geocode
tools.title: Reverse Geocode
tools.description: Convert geographic coordinates to a place name and address.

tools.name: rewrite_text
tools.title: Rewrite Text
tools.description: Rewrite text in a specified tone using Apple Intelligence (on-device Foundation Models). Requires macOS 26+ with Apple Silicon.

tools.name: run_javascript
tools.title: Run JavaScript
tools.description: Execute JavaScript in a Safari tab. Use list_tabs to find window/tab indices. Returns the result as a string.

tools.name: run_shortcut
tools.title: Run Shortcut
tools.description: Run a Siri Shortcut by name. Optionally provide text input. Returns the shortcut's output. Note: shortcuts may trigger UI prompts or perform system actions.

input.description: Optional text input for the shortcut

tools.name: scan_bluetooth
tools.title: Scan Bluetooth
tools.description: Scan for nearby BLE (Bluetooth Low Energy) devices. Returns device names, UUIDs, and signal strength (RSSI). Default scan duration is 5 seconds.

tools.name: scan_document
tools.title: Scan Document
tools.description: Extract text and structure from an image file using Apple Vision framework OCR. Returns recognized text elements with confidence scores. Works with photos of documents, receipts, whiteboards, etc.

imagePath.description: Absolute path to the image file to scan

tools.name: scan_notes
tools.title: Scan Notes
tools.description: Bulk scan notes returning metadata and a text preview for each. Supports pagination via offset. Optionally filter by folder. Use this to get an overview before organizing.

folder.description: Filter by folder name. Omit to scan all notes.

limit.description: Max number of notes to return (default: 100)

offset.description: Number of notes to skip for pagination (default: 0)

tools.name: search_chats
tools.title: Search Chats
tools.description: Search chats by participant name, handle, or chat name.

query.description: Search keyword (matches chat name, participant name, or handle)

tools.name: search_contacts
tools.title: Search Contacts
tools.description: Search contacts by name, email, phone, or organization.

tools.name: search_events
tools.title: Search Events
tools.description: Search events by keyword in title or description within a date range.

tools.name: search_files
tools.title: Search Files
tools.description: Search files using Spotlight (mdfind). Searches file names and content.

tools.name: search_location
tools.title: Search Location
tools.description: Search for a place or location in Apple Maps.

query.description: Location or place to search for

tools.name: search_messages
tools.title: Search Messages
tools.description: Search messages by keyword in subject or sender within a mailbox.

tools.name: search_nearby
tools.title: Search Nearby
tools.description: Search for places near a location in Apple Maps. If no coordinates are given, searches near the current location.

query.description: What to search for (e.g. 'coffee shops', 'gas stations')

tools.name: search_notes
tools.title: Search Notes
tools.description: Search notes by keyword in title and body. Returns matching notes with a 200-char preview.

offset.description: Number of matching results to skip (for pagination)

tools.name: search_photos
tools.title: Search Photos
tools.description: Search photos by filename, name, or description keyword.

tools.name: search_podcast_episodes
tools.title: Search Podcast Episodes
tools.description: Search across all podcast episodes by name or description.

tools.name: search_reminders
tools.title: Search Reminders
tools.description: Search reminders by keyword in name or body across all lists (case-insensitive).

tools.name: search_shortcuts
tools.title: Search Shortcuts
tools.description: Search Siri Shortcuts by name keyword.

query.description: Search keyword to match against shortcut names

tools.name: search_tabs
tools.title: Search Tabs
tools.description: Search open Safari tabs by title or URL keyword.

query.description: Search keyword to match against tab titles and URLs

tools.name: search_tracks
tools.title: Search Tracks
tools.description: Search tracks in Music library by name, artist, or album.

tools.name: semantic_clear
tools.title: Clear Semantic Index
tools.description: Delete all indexed data from the local vector store AND remove corresponding entries from macOS Spotlight. Use for privacy or to force a fresh re-index. Requires Swift bridge for Spotlight cleanup.

tools.name: semantic_index
tools.title: Build Semantic Index
tools.description: Index data from enabled Apple apps (Notes, Calendar, Reminders, Mail, Photos, Finder) into the local vector store for semantic search. Run this once, then use semantic_search. Replaces any existing index. Requires Swift bridge (npm run swift-build).

sources.description: Which sources to index. Defaults to all enabled modules.

tools.name: semantic_search
tools.title: Semantic Search
tools.description: Search across Apple app data by meaning, not just keywords. Finds related notes, events, reminders, and emails even if they use different words. Auto-indexes on first use and refreshes every 30 minutes.

tools.name: semantic_status
tools.title: Semantic Index Status
tools.description: Show the current state of the semantic vector index -- total entries, breakdown by source.

tools.name: send_file
tools.title: Send File
tools.description: Send a file attachment via iMessage/SMS. Requires absolute file path and recipient handle.

tools.name: send_mail
tools.title: Send Email
tools.description: Compose and send an email via Apple Mail. Requires allowSendMail config.

account.description: Sender email address (uses default account if omitted)

tools.name: send_message
tools.title: Send Message
tools.description: Send a text message via iMessage/SMS. Requires a phone number or email as the target handle.

target.description: Recipient handle (phone number or email, e.g. '+821012345678' or 'user@example.com')

tools.name: set_brightness
tools.title: Set Brightness
tools.description: Set the display brightness level. Requires the 'brightness' CLI tool (brew install brightness).

tools.name: set_clipboard
tools.title: Set Clipboard
tools.description: Write text to the system clipboard, replacing its current content.

text.description: Text to copy to the clipboard

tools.name: set_disliked
tools.title: Set Disliked
tools.description: Mark or unmark a track as disliked.

tools.name: set_favorited
tools.title: Set Favorited
tools.description: Mark or unmark a track as favorited (loved).

tools.name: set_file_tags
tools.title: Set File Tags
tools.description: Set Finder tags on a file. Replaces all existing tags.

tags.description: Array of tag names to set

tools.name: set_rating
tools.title: Set Rating
tools.description: Set the star rating (0-100) for a track. Use multiples of 20 for full stars (0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100).

tools.name: set_shuffle
tools.title: Set Shuffle & Repeat
tools.description: Enable/disable shuffle and set repeat mode (off, one, all).

tools.name: set_volume
tools.title: Set Volume
tools.description: Set the system output volume (0-100) and/or mute state.

tools.name: setup_permissions
tools.title: Setup Permissions
tools.description: Trigger macOS permission prompts for all Apple apps used by AirMCP. Run this once after installation to grant all permissions at once. Each app will show a one-time macOS permission dialog.

tools.name: share_location
tools.title: Share Location
tools.description: Generate a shareable Apple Maps link for a location.

tools.name: show_notification
tools.title: Show Notification
tools.description: Display a macOS system notification with optional title, subtitle, and sound.

tools.name: skill_calendar-alert
tools.title: Calendar Change Alert
tools.description: [Skill] Automatically fetches today's events when the calendar is modified.

tools.name: skill_clipboard-url-to-reading
tools.title: Clipboard URL → Reading List
tools.description: [Skill] Listens for clipboard changes and, when a URL is on the pasteboard, pushes it into Safari's Reading List. Combines the `pasteboard_changed` event trigger with `on_error: continue` so non-URL clipboard content doesn't spam the user with errors — Safari's validator rejects the non-URL and the skill quietly moves on.

tools.name: skill_daily-journal
tools.title: Daily Journal → Memory
tools.description: [Skill] Captures today's events + open reminders, summarises them on-device, and persists the summary as a context-memory `episode` tagged `journal`. Demonstrates inputs + parallel + retry + the newly-exposed `memory_put` tool working together so ai_agent can later recall "what did I do last Tuesday?" via `memory_query`. DESTRUCTIVE: writes a memory entry (non-destructive to Apple apps).

note.description: Optional free-form note to prepend to the auto-generated summary.

tools.name: skill_evening-winddown
tools.title: Evening Wind-down
tools.description: [Skill] Fires when the screen is locked — drafts a short day-in-review note covering today's events + open reminders so the next unlock (or tomorrow morning) has a fresh snapshot waiting. Showcases the `screen_locked` event trigger combined with `parallel` reads and `retry` on the on-device summariser.

tools.name: skill_focus-block-planner
tools.title: Focus Block Planner
tools.description: [Skill] Walks today's open reminders and drops a calendar time-block for each one. Uses `loop` with `on_error: continue` so a single failed event creation (e.g. conflicting calendar, missing permission) doesn't abort the rest of the plan — the skill result reports which reminders got blocked and which didn't. DESTRUCTIVE: creates calendar events; each insertion is gated by HITL approval.

tools.name: skill_focus-guardian
tools.title: Focus Mode Guardian
tools.description: [Skill] Auto-snapshots today's events and open reminders whenever the system focus mode changes (entering/leaving Do Not Disturb, Work, Personal, etc.) so the AI has fresh context right after you change mode. Showcases the `focus_mode_changed` event trigger plus parallel data gathering.

tools.name: skill_inbox-triage
tools.title: Inbox Triage
tools.description: [Skill] Check unread mail count and list recent messages for triage.

tools.name: skill_project-digest
tools.title: Project Digest
tools.description: [Skill] Semantic-search the user's indexed Apple data for a topic, then loop over each match to pull semantically-related items — effectively a cross-app "everything about this project" view. Demonstrates the Skills DSL's loop construct and conditional execution.

tools.name: skill_sender-to-tasks
tools.title: Sender → Tasks
tools.description: [Skill] Scans mail for a keyword and turns each hit into a reminder so nothing in the inbox goes unresolved. Accepts runtime inputs so the same skill handles newsletter triage, a specific sender, or any ad-hoc query without editing YAML. Loop + `on_error: continue` means the rest of the batch still gets queued even if one reminder-create fails (HITL denial, Reminders permission, etc.). DESTRUCTIVE: creates reminders; each insertion is gated by HITL approval.

limit.description: Max messages to process per run.

tools.name: smart_clipboard
tools.title: Smart Clipboard
tools.description: Get clipboard content with automatic type detection (text, URL, email, phone, date, file path, image). More structured than raw clipboard access.

tools.name: speech_availability
tools.title: Speech Recognition Status
tools.description: Check if on-device speech recognition is available and authorized.

tools.name: spotlight_clear
tools.title: Clear Spotlight Index
tools.description: Remove all AirMCP entries from macOS Spotlight without clearing the local vector store. Requires Swift bridge.

tools.name: spotlight_sync
tools.title: Sync to Spotlight
tools.description: Push semantically indexed data to macOS Core Spotlight, making it discoverable via Spotlight search and Siri. Run after semantic_index to expose your notes, events, reminders, and emails to system-wide search. Requires Swift bridge (npm run swift-build).

tools.name: suggest_next_tools
tools.title: Suggest Next Tools
tools.description: Based on your usage patterns, suggest which tools typically follow a given tool. Learns from how you use AirMCP over time. Returns frequently-used tool sequences.

after.description: Tool name to get suggestions for — e.g. 'today_events'

tools.name: summarize_context
tools.title: Summarize Context
tools.description: Collect context from all enabled Apple apps and ask the client's LLM to produce a concise briefing. Uses MCP Sampling — works with any LLM the client is using. No API keys required.

tools.name: summarize_text
tools.title: Summarize Text
tools.description: Summarize text using Apple Intelligence (on-device Foundation Models). Requires macOS 26+ with Apple Silicon.

tools.name: system_power
tools.title: System Power
tools.description: Shutdown or restart the Mac. Use with caution.

tools.name: system_sleep
tools.title: System Sleep
tools.description: Put the Mac to sleep.

tools.name: tag_content
tools.title: Tag Content
tools.description: Classify and tag content using Apple's on-device Foundation Model. Returns confidence scores for each provided tag/category. Requires macOS 26+.

tags.description: List of tag/category names to classify the content against

tools.name: timeline_today
tools.title: Timeline (Today)
tools.description: Display today's events and due reminders on a single day-axis timeline. Fuses Calendar + Reminders; items without a start/due time fall into an 'Unscheduled' rail.

tools.name: today_events
tools.title: Today's Events
tools.description: Get all calendar events for today.

tools.name: toggle_dark_mode
tools.title: Toggle Dark Mode
tools.description: Toggle macOS appearance between dark mode and light mode.

tools.name: toggle_focus_mode
tools.title: Toggle Focus Mode
tools.description: Toggle Do Not Disturb (Focus mode) on or off.

enable.description: True to enable Do Not Disturb, false to disable

tools.name: toggle_wifi
tools.title: Toggle WiFi
tools.description: Turn WiFi on or off.

enable.description: True to enable WiFi, false to disable

tools.name: transcribe_audio
tools.title: Transcribe Audio
tools.description: Transcribe an audio file to text using Apple's on-device speech recognition. Supports most audio formats (m4a, mp3, wav, caf).

path.description: Absolute path to the audio file

language.description: Language code (e.g. 'en-US', 'ko-KR', 'ja-JP'). Defaults to system language.

tools.name: trash_file
tools.title: Trash File
tools.description: Move a file or folder to the Trash using Finder.

path.description: Absolute path of the file or folder to trash

tools.name: tv_list_playlists
tools.title: List TV Playlists
tools.description: List all playlists (libraries) in Apple TV app.

tools.name: tv_list_tracks
tools.title: List TV Tracks
tools.description: List movies/episodes in a TV playlist.

tools.name: tv_now_playing
tools.title: TV Now Playing
tools.description: Get currently playing content in Apple TV app.

tools.name: tv_play
tools.title: Play TV Content
tools.description: Play a movie or episode by name.

tools.name: tv_playback_control
tools.title: TV Playback Control
tools.description: Control Apple TV playback: play, pause, next, previous.

tools.name: tv_search
tools.title: Search TV Library
tools.description: Search movies and TV shows by name or show title.

tools.name: ui_accessibility_query
tools.title: Query UI Elements
tools.description: Search for UI elements by accessibility attributes (role, title, value, description, identifier). More precise than ui_read — returns only matching elements with full attribute data. Works on any app, including those without AppleScript support. Requires Accessibility permissions.

app.description: App name to search in. If omitted, uses frontmost app.

label.description: General label search — matches across name, title, value, and description

tools.name: ui_click
tools.title: Click UI Element
tools.description: Click a UI element either by exact screen coordinates (x, y) or by searching for an element containing the given text. Optionally filter by accessibility role (e.g. 'AXButton', 'AXMenuItem', 'AXTextField'). Requires Accessibility permissions.

appName.description: App name to activate before clicking. If omitted, uses the frontmost app.

text.description: Text to search for in UI element names, descriptions, titles, and values

index.description: If multiple elements match, click the one at this index (default: 0, first match)

tools.name: ui_diff
tools.title: Compare UI State
tools.description: Compare the current UI state against a previous snapshot to detect changes. Pass the 'elements' array from a previous ui_traverse result as beforeSnapshot. Returns added, removed, and changed elements. Useful for verifying action results.

beforeSnapshot.description: JSON string of previous UI tree snapshot (elements array from ui_traverse)

tools.name: ui_open_app
tools.title: Open App (UI Automation)
tools.description: Open an application by name or bundle ID and return an accessibility tree summary of its windows and top-level UI elements. Requires Accessibility permissions.

tools.name: ui_perform_action
tools.title: Perform Action on UI Element
tools.description: Find a UI element by locator (role + title/value) and perform an accessibility action on it. Actions: press (click), pick (select), confirm, setValue, raise (focus), showMenu. Combines query + action in one step. Requires Accessibility permissions.

index.description: If multiple matches, act on element at this index (default: 0)

tools.name: ui_press_key
tools.title: Press Key Combination
tools.description: Send a key or key combination (e.g. Return, Cmd+S, Ctrl+C). Supports modifier keys: command/cmd, shift, option/alt, control/ctrl. Special keys: return, enter, tab, space, delete, escape, arrow keys (up/down/left/right), F1-F12, home, end, pageup, pagedown. Requires Accessibility permissions.

key.description: Key to press — a single character (e.g. 's', 'a') or special key name (e.g. 'return', 'tab', 'escape', 'up', 'f5')

appName.description: App name to activate before pressing keys. If omitted, sends to the frontmost app.

tools.name: ui_read
tools.title: Read Accessibility Tree
tools.description: Read the accessibility tree of the frontmost app (or specified app). Returns structured data about all visible UI elements including their roles, names, values, positions, and hierarchy. Use this to understand what UI elements are available before interacting with them. Requires Accessibility permissions.

appName.description: App name to read. If omitted, reads the frontmost app.

maxDepth.description: Maximum depth of the UI tree to traverse (default: 3)

maxElements.description: Maximum number of UI elements to return (default: 200)

tools.name: ui_scroll
tools.title: Scroll
tools.description: Scroll in the specified direction within the frontmost window. Uses arrow key simulation for cross-app compatibility. Requires Accessibility permissions.

appName.description: App name to activate before scrolling. If omitted, scrolls in the frontmost app.

tools.name: ui_traverse
tools.title: BFS Traverse UI Tree
tools.description: Breadth-first traversal of the accessibility tree. Returns a flat list of all UI elements with parent-child relationships, positions, sizes, and states. Supports PID targeting and visible-only filtering. More thorough than ui_read. Requires Accessibility permissions.

app.description: App name to traverse. If omitted, uses frontmost app.

pid.description: Process ID for precise targeting (overrides app name lookup)

onlyVisible.description: Only include elements with visible position/size

tools.name: ui_type
tools.title: Type Text
tools.description: Type text into the currently focused field using simulated keystrokes via System Events. Optionally activate a specific app first. Requires Accessibility permissions.

appName.description: App name to activate before typing. If omitted, types into the frontmost app.

tools.name: update_contact
tools.title: Update Contact
tools.description: Update contact properties. Only specified fields are changed.

tools.name: update_event
tools.title: Update Event
tools.description: Update event properties. Only specified fields are changed. Attendees and recurrence rules cannot be modified via automation.

tools.name: update_note
tools.title: Update Note
tools.description: Replace the entire body of an existing note. WARNING: This overwrites all content. Read the note first if you need to preserve parts of it. Attachments may be lost.

body.description: New HTML body to replace existing content

tools.name: update_reminder
tools.title: Update Reminder
tools.description: Update reminder properties. Only specified fields are changed. Set dueDate to null to clear it. Recurrence rules cannot be modified via automation.

dueDate.description: New due date (ISO 8601, e.g. '2026-03-15T10:00:00Z') or null to clear
